fixes.right: “Take heed to the ministry which thou hast received in the Lord, that thou fulfil it.”

headings.text: HOW THE SUBJECT SHOULD BE STUDIED.

italics: acquisition of knowledge as to the duties of their office as one of their most important pursuits
studied with all the thoroughness to which hope of success in the most blessed work would lead
